---
id: delete-datasets
title: "Delete datasets"
description: "Deletes the datasets identified by the provided `datasetIds`. Append `?workspaceId` to delete datasets in a workspace context."
sidebar_label: "Delete datasets"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: platform-api//seqera-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Delete datasets"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/datasets"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Deletes the datasets identified by the provided `datasetIds`. Append `?workspaceId` to delete datasets in a workspace context.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
